name: Changing Majors
overview: Changing Majors is a South Korean variety web series featuring various universities, colleges and schools, and the courses offered inside. The series starred Lee Chang-sub of BtoB for the first five seasons, and Kai of Exo beginning season 6.

trailers.title: [EN] 대학 캠퍼스 휩쓸고 다니는 전과자 | 전과자 하이라이트
